# zstack_pci_device_offering (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage PCI device offerings in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `device_id` (String) Device ID.
- `vendor_id` (String) Vendor ID.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description.
- `name` (String) The offering name.
- `ram_size` (String) RAM size.
- `subdevice_id` (String) Subdevice ID.
- `subvendor_id` (String) Subvendor ID.

### Read-Only

- `type` (String) Offering type.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the PCI device offering.
